content.title: Hobson TODOs
content.description:
- z-index management for windows is flaky.
- Why do we have module loading code in kernel-core and kernel-module?
- Save & Test option in code editor breaks window restore/minimise/maximise.
- Viewport children panel - shows children of selected item. Panel should be collapsible.
- context menu submenu should always display within viewport. Currently goes outside when right-clicking a RH side.
 - Store default child window size in [system:preferences](item://00000000-0000-0000-0000-00000000000a)

The next two items will be fixed by event system (implemented) + reactive endering (TBD):

- Can't edit multiple code files at once. Saving first file results in full re-render, thus losing changes in second file.
 - Tag browser loses state when matching item clicked. Another full re-render problem.
